PowerShell(node -e "const {buildReportFromAi}=require\('./src/engine/aiReportAdapter'\);const fs=require\('fs'\);const arr=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/mock/diagnoses.json','utf8'\)\);const d=arr.find\(x=>x.assessment_id==2601\);const server={server_id:99,hostname:'jessy167',os_type:'windows'};const r=buildReportFromAi\(d,server\);const s=r.session;console.log\('jessy167 #2601:'\);console.log\('  ��ü allRows',r.allRows.length,'| 2026���� scopedRows',r.scopedRows.length,'| 2026��',r.outOfScopeRows.length\);console.log\('  2026 KPI: ���',s.scope_vuln,'��ȣ',s.scope_safe,'�����Ұ�',s.scope_na,'����',s.scope_info\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const ExcelJS=require\('exceljs'\);\(async\(\)=>{const wb=new ExcelJS.Workbook\(\);await wb.xlsx.readFile\('리포트1.xlsx'\);const ct=c=>{let v=c.value;if\(v&&typeof v==='object'\){if\(v.richText\)return v.richText.map\(t=>t.text\).join\(''\);if\(v.text\)return v.text;return '';}return v==null?'':String\(v\);};for\(const name of ['Windows','Linux']\){const ws=wb.getWorksheet\(name\);const set=new Set\(\);for\(let r=1;r<=ws.rowCount;r++\){for\(let i=1;i<=ws.columnCount;i++\){const m=String\(ct\(ws.getRow\(r\).getCell\(i\)\)\).match\(/SRV-\(\\d+\)/i\);if\(m\)set.add\('SRV-'+m[1].padStart\(3,'0'\)\);}}console.log\(name+': 고유 SRV '+set.size\);}}\)\(\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const ExcelJS=require\('exceljs'\);\(async\(\)=>{const wb=new ExcelJS.Workbook\(\);await wb.xlsx.readFile\('리포트1.xlsx'\);const ct=c=>{let v=c.value;if\(v&&typeof v==='object'\){if\(v.richText\)return v.richText.map\(t=>t.text\).join\(''\);if\(v.text\)return v.text;return '';}return v==null?'':String\(v\);};for\(const name of ['Windows','Linux']\){const ws=wb.getWorksheet\(name\);const set=new Set\(\);const maxC=Math.min\(ws.columnCount,18\);for\(let r=1;r<=ws.rowCount;r++\){for\(let i=1;i<=maxC;i++\){const m=String\(ct\(ws.getRow\(r\).getCell\(i\)\)\).match\(/SRV-\(\\d+\)/i\);if\(m\)set.add\('SRV-'+m[1].padStart\(3,'0'\)\);}}console.log\(name+': 고유 SRV '+set.size+' \(rows '+ws.rowCount+'\)'\);}console.log\('checkspec JSON:',require\('./data/report1-2026-checkspec.json'\).os.windows&&Object.keys\(require\('./data/report1-2026-checkspec.json'\).os.windows\).length,'/',Object.keys\(require\('./data/report1-2026-checkspec.json'\).os.linux\).length\);}\)\(\);")

PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const a=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/mock/diagnoses.json','utf8'\)\);const gi=d=>{for\(const k of Object.keys\(d\)\)if\(Array.isArray\(d[k]\)&&d[k][0]&&d[k][0].chk_id\)return d[k];return[];};for\(const id of [2603,2613,2597]\){const d=a.find\(x=>x.assessment_id==id\);if\(!d\)continue;const it=gi\(d\);const llm=it.filter\(x=>x.ai_verdict&&x._diagnosis_mode!=='ai'\);const times=it.map\(x=>x.elapsed_ms||0\).filter\(Boolean\);const avg=times.length?Math.round\(times.reduce\(\(s,v\)=>s+v,0\)/times.length\):0;const mx=times.length?Math.max\(...times\):0;console.log\('#'+id,d.hostname,d.diagnose_type,'items',it.length,'| 항목당 평균',avg+'ms','최대',mx+'ms','| elapsed_ms\(record\)',d.elapsed_ms\);}")
